name: Daily Mortgage News Digest (Gemini + Google Sheets)

nodes.name: 6 AM Daily (Mon–Fri)
nodes.notes: Runs 10:00 UTC = 6:00 AM Eastern, weekdays only. For 7 days use: 0 10 * * *. Adjust hour for other timezones (e.g. 11 = 7 AM Eastern).

nodes.name: Fetch Active Subscribers
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with your actual Sheet ID from the URL. Reads by header name 'active' = TRUE so adding new columns never breaks this node.

parts.text: You are a senior mortgage industry analyst producing a daily briefing for mortgage professionals. You have deep expertise in MBS markets, Fed policy, housing economics, and the mortgage origination business. You write with precision and authority. You never speculate beyond what the data supports, but you do draw clear analytical conclusions. Your audience — loan officers, brokers, lender executives, and real estate agents — needs actionable intelligence, not summaries they could find themselves.

Today's date: {{ $now.format('EEEE, MMMM d, yyyy') }}

Use Google Search to find TODAY'S most important mortgage and real estate news. Search specifically across these sources:
- HousingWire (housingwire.com)
- Mortgage News Daily (mortgagenewsdaily.com)
- MBS Live (mbslive.com)
- National Mortgage Professional (nationalmortgageprofessional.com)
- Federal Reserve (federalreserve.gov)
- CFPB (consumerfinance.gov)
- Freddie Mac (freddiemac.com)
- Fannie Mae (fanniemae.com)
- Mortgage Bankers Association (mba.org)
- National Association of Realtors (nar.realtor)
- Bloomberg Real Estate section
- Wall Street Journal Housing section

Focus on: mortgage rate movements, MBS pricing/spreads, Fed statements or data, housing inventory, purchase/refi application volume, GSE news, regulatory changes, lender layoffs/expansions, housing starts/permits, CPI/PCE/jobs data affecting rates.

For each story, reason carefully about downstream consequences:
- FIRST ORDER EFFECTS: Direct, immediate consequences — what changes right away and for whom (e.g. 'rates rise X bps', 'lenders tighten guidelines', 'refi volume drops')
- SECOND ORDER EFFECTS: Downstream ripple effects that follow — less obvious, often delayed, often hitting different players (e.g. 'reduced refi volume pressures servicer revenues', 'tighter guidelines shift demand toward FHA', 'builder sentiment softens if buyer traffic falls')

Only include effects when the story has meaningful downstream consequences. Routine data releases with no surprises do not need effects. High-importance stories should almost always have them. Be specific and actionable.

Return ONLY valid JSON — no markdown, no code fences, no preamble:
{
  "date": "{{ $now.format('EEEE, MMMM d, yyyy') }}",
  "subject": "catchy but professional email subject line under 60 chars",
  "marketSnapshot": {
    "narrative": "3-4 sentence market overview written for mortgage pros",
    "rates": [
      { "label": "30-YR FIXED", "value": "X.XX%", "change": "+X bps" },
      { "label": "15-YR FIXED", "value": "X.XX%", "change": "+X bps" },
      { "label": "10-YR TREASURY", "value": "X.XX%", "change": "+X bps" },
      { "label": "MBS 6.0 COUPON", "value": "XX-XX", "change": "+X ticks" },
      { "label": "FED FUNDS", "value": "X.XX–X.XX%", "change": "unchanged" }
    ]
  },
  "stories": [
    {
      "source": "Source Name",
      "sourceUrl": "https://full-article-url.com",
      "headline": "Full headline",
      "summary": "2-3 sentence summary explaining the story and why it matters to mortgage professionals",
      "keyPoints": ["bullet 1", "bullet 2", "bullet 3"],
      "effects": {
        "hasEffects": true,
        "firstOrder": ["Immediate effect 1", "Immediate effect 2"],
        "secondOrder": ["Downstream ripple 1", "Downstream ripple 2"]
      },
      "importance": "high or normal",
      "category": "rates | mbs | housing | fed | regulatory | gse | lender | economy"
    }
  ],
  "watchList": ["Item 1 to watch today", "Item 2 to watch today", "Item 3 to watch today"],
  "closingNote": "One sentence forward-looking observation for the day"
}

For stories without meaningful downstream effects, set effects to: { "hasEffects": false }.
Include 6-10 stories. Mark 1-3 as high importance. Order by importance then recency.

nodes.name: Generate Digest via Gemini
nodes.notes: Calls Gemini 2.5 Pro with Google Search grounding. Credential: Query Auth, Name=key, Value=your Google AI Studio API key from aistudio.google.com/apikey

nodes.name: Build HTML Email
nodes.notes: Branded footer: 'Mortgage Digest — JWH Finance' with mortgage-digest@jwhfinance.com. Update UNSUBSCRIBE_WEBHOOK to your actual n8n webhook URL after deployment.

nodes.name: Split Subscribers
nodes.notes: Loops through each subscriber one at a time. Increase batchSize to 10-50 for larger lists if Gmail rate limits allow.

nodes.name: Send via Gmail
nodes.notes: Sends from the Gmail account authorized via OAuth2. To send FROM mortgage-digest@jwhfinance.com, first add it as a 'Send mail as' alias in Gmail Settings → Accounts and Import, verify it, then add 'fromEmail: mortgage-digest@jwhfinance.com' to the options above. The senderName shows 'Mortgage Digest | JWH Finance' in the inbox.

nodes.name: Signup Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives signups from the landing page. After deploying, copy this URL and paste it into the WEBHOOK_URL variable in digest-signup.jsx

nodes.name: Save to Google Sheet
nodes.notes: Uses appendOrUpdate with email as match key — so re-subscribing reactivates the row rather than creating a duplicate. All fields written by header name so you can add columns to the sheet freely.

parameters.subject: Welcome to the Daily Mortgage Digest
parameters.message:
={{ '

DAILY BRIEFING

Mortgage & Real Estate Digest

Hi ' + $('Validate Signup').item.json.firstName + ', you're in.

Your first Daily Mortgage & Real Estate Digest arrives tomorrow morning at 6 AM Eastern. Every weekday you'll get:

  • Current mortgage rates & MBS pricing
  • Top 6–10 stories from 12 industry sources
  • Fed & regulatory updates
  • First & second order effects analysis
  • What to watch for the day

Mortgage Digest — JWH Finance

mortgage-digest@jwhfinance.com

' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ $json.valid ? JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Subscribed!' }) : JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: $json.error }) }}

nodes.name: Unsubscribe Webhook
nodes.notes: GET request so clicking the email link works directly in browser. URL: https://YOUR-N8N/webhook/digest-unsubscribe?email=user@example.com

parameters.responseBody:
👋

You've been unsubscribed.

You won't receive any more emails from the Mortgage Digest. If this was a mistake, visit the signup page to re-subscribe.

Mortgage Digest — JWH Finance
